These timestamps may correspond to different sync instances which may result in a sync start time being later than a separate sync completed time. To ensure you are retrieving the latest available data reference the `last_sync_finished` timestamp where `last_sync_result` is `DONE`. Possible values for `status` and `last_sync_result` are `DISABLED`, `DONE`, `FAILED`, `PARTIALLY_SYNCED`, `PAUSED`, `SYNCING`. Learn more about sync status in our [Help Center](https://help.merge.dev/en/articles/8184193-merge-sync-statuses).
